institution.name: Beth Israel Deaconess Medical Center
aliases: Harvard Medical School — Visiting Students Program (covering BIDMC placement)
institution.healthSystem: Beth Israel Lahey Health (clinical) / Harvard Medical School (academic)

searchTermsTried: Beth Israel Deaconess Medical Center BIDMC visiting medical student elective Harvard HMS VSLO
searchProcess.robotsOrAccessNotes: bidmc.org accessible; BIDMC routes visiting medical students through HMS Office of the Registrar.

candidateFindings.pageTitle: Undergraduate Medical Education | BIDMC of Boston
candidateFindings.shortQuote: To be considered for enrollment in a BIDMC elective course, students must submit application materials to the HMS Office of the Registrar.

negativeEvidence.strongNegativeEvidence: BIDMC does NOT run an independent visiting-medical-student program. All visiting-MS access is via HMS Office of the Registrar (same path as BWH and MGH).
negativeEvidence.weakNegativeEvidence: BIDMC-specific audience verbatim was not captured this turn (inherits HMS policy).

nextAction: Same shape as BWH and MGH: HMS-routed; final-year MS; international Oct-Mar window; $115 app fee per experience. BIDMC-specific: positive antibody titers required (not just vaccination records).
plainEnglishSummary: BIDMC accepts visiting medical students through Harvard Medical School's Office of the Registrar — same path as BWH and MGH. Final-year medical students apply via VSLO. International students can apply but only for October-March rotations. $115 application fee per experience. BIDMC-specific requirement: positive antibody titers (not just vaccination records).
driftCheck: This advanced national USCE discovery because Boston cluster expanded to 4 of 5 (BMC + BWH + MGH + BIDMC); BIDMC correctly identified as HMS-routed rather than independent.
